papers.title: Optimal Stabilizer Testing and Learning with Limited Quantum Memory
papers.summary: We study stabilizer state testing and learning with limited coherent quantum memory. Here an algorithm sequentially receives copies of an unknown $n$-qubit state, but may keep only $k$ qubits of coherent quantum memory between measurements.
